target.name: Villin headpiece
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be the 36-residue HP36 subdomain; with no MSA it is a hard, low-signal case.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 1VII chain A only. Run without evolutionary search (single sequence), so expect modest confidence - the point is the physics story, not a clean fold.
